title: Author Signing: Shane Parrish
author: Shane Parrish
description: Join us at BookPeople Bookstore for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Shane Parrish, celebrating their work, including "Clear Thinking". author: Emily Henry
description: Join us at John K. King Used & Rare Books for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Emily Henry, celebrating their work, including "Funny Story". title: Book Discussion: The Wager
author: David Grann
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Wager" by David Grann. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at BookPeople Bookstore. Refreshments served.

author: Emily Henry
